name: Spam Hawaiian Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can Refrigerated all-ready pizza crust (10 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut in thin squares (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. Unroll the dough and press it into the prepared pan.
4. Top with cheese.
5. Arrange the remaining ingredients over the cheese.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is deep golden brown.
